failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS publication_id,
  p.description,
  p.published_at
FROM publication p
WHERE 
  p.description ILIKE '%new menu%' 
  OR p.description ILIKE '%introducing%' 
  OR p.description ILIKE '%new item%'
ORDER BY p.published_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: Query executed successfully but returned 0 rows — the filter may be too restrictive. Consider: OR instead of AND between separate concepts, dropping an overly specific constraint, or a broader tsquery.

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS publication_id,
  p.description,
  p.published_at
FROM publication p
WHERE
  p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'new & (menu | item | dish | food | introduce)')
ORDER BY p.published_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: Query executed successfully but returned 0 rows — the filter may be too restrictive. Consider: OR instead of AND between separate concepts, dropping an overly specific constraint, or a broader tsquery.
